mapper.sql: t.id, t.assignment_id, t.order_id, t.order_store_code, t.owner_store_code, t.delivery_store_code, t.origin_region_code, t.owner_region_code, t.delivery_region_code, t.sales_code, t.assign_type, t.assign_reason, t.assign_time, t.operator_code, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_assignment t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order_assignment t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_assignment t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_assignment ( assignment_id, order_id, order_store_code, owner_store_code, delivery_store_code, origin_region_code, owner_region_code, delivery_region_code, sales_code, assign_type, assign_reason, assign_time, operator_code, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{assignmentId}, #{orderId}, #{orderStoreCode}, #{ownerStoreCode}, #{deliveryStoreCode}, #{originRegionCode}, #{ownerRegionCode}, #{deliveryRegionCode}, #{salesCode}, #{assignType}, #{assignReason}, #{assignTime}, #{operatorCode}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_assignment ( assignment_id, order_id, order_store_code, owner_store_code, delivery_store_code, origin_region_code, owner_region_code, delivery_region_code, sales_code, assign_type, assign_reason, assign_time, operator_code, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.assignmentId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderStoreCode}, #{item.ownerStoreCode}, #{item.deliveryStoreCode}, #{item.originRegionCode}, #{item.ownerRegionCode}, #{item.deliveryRegionCode}, #{item.salesCode}, #{item.assignType}, #{item.assignReason}, #{item.assignTime}, #{item.operatorCode}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_assignment t SET
t.owner_store_code = #{ownerStoreCode},
t.delivery_store_code = #{deliveryStoreCode},
t.sales_code = #{salesCode},
t.assign_type = #{assignType},
t.assign_reason = #{assignReason},
t.assign_time = #{assignTime},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_assignment t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
